title: Zumba with Veva
description: Start your Saturday off with an enjoyable and effective workout! (At office during inclement weather.)

description: Kids Art Club! Clases de Arte para Niñxs! – Lessons change Weekly Students learn about art theory, movements and how to find and use their creative voice. Led by artist instructors. title: Boxing/Kickboxing Workout
description: America’s Finest Karate & Kickboxing will join us on 34 Ave & 93 St to offer free kickboxing class (12+ years old).

title: Food Scrap Drop Off (FSDO)
description: Moore Jackson Community Garden’s Composting Committee collects food scraps throughout the year. During colder months, the bins you see here will be outside our fence by our double gate on 51st Street between 31/32 Aves. Please only drop off scraps on Saturdays between 9 a.m. and 12 noon.

title: JHBG’s Tree LC
description: We need your help to keep our trees and gardens healthy and clean! Meet 10am in front of 3541 80th st! We will gather our tools and head out to the treebeds and gardens to water, clean and mulch. We work until noon. No experience necessary – we supply work gloves, tools and guidance. We […]

title: 34 Ave Gardening Club
description: Meet up at 34 Ave & 93 St to pick up gloves and tools and get a street assignment.

title: 34 Ave World Bike Ride
description: Travel the world without leaving Queens: Beginner to intermediate rides to points of interest in & around Jackson Heights. Rides are open to all. No bike? Are you 16 yo or over? No worries @Citibike has you covered. Download app before arrival. No helmet? Please DM us before the ride and we will bring one for […]

title: NY Indonesian Food Bazaar
description: A collaboration of Queens Together and Next Stop Elmhurst. Enjoy traditional cuisine, live music, and traditional dance performance (held indoors).

title: Clases de Baile – Cumbia Sonidera
description: Cumbia Sonidera Lessons- all ages. Come ready to dance with our instructor extraordinaire @coolmarx (inside school or outside – instructor will decide)

title: Visibility Brigade – Jackson Heights
description: The Visibility Brigade aka Rush Hour Resistance was founded in 2020 to provide physical messaging in the real world. We remind everyday people that they are not alone in these unprecedented times. WE PROVIDE THE MESSAGING, YOU JUST NEED TO SHOW UP WITH YOUR PASSION! Please visit https://visibilitybrigade.com for more info. Note: For safety reasons, we do […]

title: Elmhurst Day 2026
description: Elmhurst Day is a vibrant, neighborhood-wide celebration of cultures, community, and local merchants in the heart of the World’s Borough. We invite everyone to come and explore the international foods, shops, dance performances, and cultural sites that make Elmhurst a special place to call home and an inviting destination to visit.

title: Paint & Print with Pride with SeparatingSkies and Justin
description: Join Jasmin of separatingskies and Justin to screen print, block print, and paint signs for pride month in June to use in marches, hang at home, or share with neighbors. Participants are encouraged to bring cardboard, shirts, and tote bags to print and paint on. Donation based – Fundraiser Love Wins NYC – An LGBTQ+ […]

title: Pride Month: Cuban Transformismo in New York City (1960s-1990s)
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: El transformismo cubano en la ciudad de Nueva York (décadas de 1960 a 1990) English: This talk looks into the history of Cuban female impersonation or drag performance in New York City during the second half of the 20th century. Librada will begin by introducing her work with Archivo Cubanecuir, a community archives dedicated to […]

title: Children’s Art Class ( 7 years and up)
description: Instruction is given individually and suitable for both beginning and experienced artists. It can include simple drawing, watercolors, oil, acrylics, etc. A set of four weekly classes is $100 for members; or $125 for nonmembers. One class is $30 for members or $40 for nonmembers. title: Dance Party at Murray Playground LIC
description: Join QDF for a dance lesson and open dance floor for all to a live Queens musical guest! Join us for a thematic afternoon of a dance lesson and open dance floor for all to live Queen musical guest! Location: Murray Playground, 21st Street at 45th Road, Long Island City Transportation: E/M/7/G to Court Square […]

title: Queens Night Market
address: Flushing Meadows Corona Park, Building, Corona, NY 11368, USA
description: NYC’S FIRST & MOST AFFORDABLE NIGHT MARKET! The Queens Night Market is a large, family-friendly open-air night market in Queens, featuring over 100 independent vendors selling merchandise, art, and food and featuring small-scale cultural performances, all celebrating the rich cultural diversity and heritage of NYC and Queens. Vendor list: https://queensnightmarket.com/vendors Performers 04:00 pm – 06:00 pm: […]

title: Queens Rising at Queens Night Market

title: Complimentary Wine Tasting
description: Stop by between 5pm and 8pm. Let us introduce you to wines worth talking about.

title: Making & Meaning of Pride + Community Sing
description: Can we hold space across generations to have our multiple conflicting stories and relationships to Pride? Queens Pride, like many mainstream Pride events across the U.S., platforms the police, uplifts corporations, and chooses silence in the face of genocide. Let’s talk across generation gaps about our relationships with the second oldest and second largest pride […]
